name: TWILIO INC
summary: Twilio Inc. provides a cloud communications platform that enables businesses to embed messaging, voice, email, and video interactions into customer-facing applications via APIs. Its platform combines communications APIs (Programmable Messaging, Programmable Voice, SendGrid Email), software products (digital engagement centers, marketing campaigns, user authentication), customer data capabilities, and AI-powered orchestration. As of December 31, 2025, Twilio served over 402,000 Active Customer Accounts ranging from SMBs to large enterprises across numerous industries.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
